FEAT_CLI.description: MOD-007: Unified CLI — usbctl dispatcher: usb/config/alias/validate subcommands

FEAT_ESSENTIALS.description: MOD-012: Essentials Installer — Build toolchain provisioner

FEAT_AUTOMOUNT.description: MOD-013: USB Auto-Mount — udev rules + systemd service for automatic USB mounting

FEAT_HEMLOCK_CLI.description: MOD-015: Hemlock Host CLI — Host-side entrypoint: container lifecycle, staging watcher, exec

FEAT_HEMLOCK_TUI.description: MOD-016: Hemlock Runtime TUI — In-container menu: agent/crew/validation/security/monitoring/config
